senses.gloss: to speak or write unclearly or unintelligibly, to mumble, to lisp (sense 2)
to cause to be incorrect, unclear or barbarous
to point letters or a text

examples.text: وَلَوْ نَزَّلْنَاهُ عَلَى بَعْضِ ٱلْأَعْجَمِينَ / فَقَرَأَهُ عَلَيْهِم مَا كَانُوا بِهِ مُؤْمِنِينَ

etymology.text: Color or defect adjective from the root ع ج م (ʕ j m).
